Operation 'getTransaction' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity about input requirements (transaction token parameter), output structure (TransactionDetails schema), and what 'complete details' encompasses. Enhanced description specifies the required parameter, return schema, and key fields returned to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves complete transaction details using a valid transaction token.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete transaction details for a specified transaction using its transaction token. Returns a TransactionDetails object containing all transaction information including status, amounts, timestamps, and customer details. Requires a valid transaction token as input parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity about input requirements (transaction token parameter), output structure (TransactionDetails schema), and what 'complete details' encompasses. Enhanced description specifies the required parameter, return schema, and key fields returned to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getDailyTransactions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is generic and doesn't convey the date range aspect clearly. Description mentions filtering but lacks specificity about input parameters (date range format, status code options) and output structure (DailyTransaction array). Enhanced version clarifies parameters, return type, and use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus getTransaction.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of transactions for a specified date range, optionally filtered by status codes.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of transactions for a specified date range, optionally filtered by transaction status codes. Accepts date range parameters (from/to dates) and optional status filter. Returns an array of DailyTransaction objects containing transaction summaries. Useful for reconciliation and transaction reporting.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic and doesn't convey the date range aspect clearly. Description mentions filtering but lacks specificity about input parameters (date range format, status code options) and output structure (DailyTransaction array). Enhanced version clarifies parameters, return type, and use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus getTransaction.
